title: Capacity registry item (GET /registry)
description: One agent's capacity row from the control plane's registry. As-built source of truth: the `capacity` table in apps/control-plane/src/registry.rs (columns handle, provides, free_slots, host, last_seen_epoch), fed by `agent.capacity` envelopes. Liveness is DERIVED by the consumer from last_seen_epoch staleness, never served as stored state: alive; suspect when age > 90s (SUSPECT_AFTER_SECS); down when age > 300s (DOWN_AFTER_SECS) — the same 90/300 constants the control plane's own routing uses. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

handle.description: Canonical lowercase agent handle (registry primary key).

provides.description: Capability tags this agent provides (stored as a JSON array; set semantics — order is not meaningful).

free_slots.description: How many more work items the agent reports it can take.

host.description: Host label, canonical form ('.N' for lab dot-hosts); null when unreported.

last_seen_epoch.description: Epoch seconds of the last capacity report. Consumers derive liveness from its age: alive / suspect >90s / down >300s.
